texto: The secret of every man who has ever been successful lies in the fact that he formed the bait of doing those things that failures don't like to do.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a A. Jackson King: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “The secret of every man who has ever been successful lies in the fact that he formed the bait of …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, success, secret pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
